reasoning: I voted for Mamata and the TMC in 2019, and nothing has changed my mind. The Krishak Bandhu money came into my account—my own account—before that cyclone hit. A government that thinks of farmers before disaster strikes is not a government I abandon. The BJP talks of citizenship and nation, but that talk does not protect a man like me; it threatens him. Mamata says no NRC in Bengal, and I believe her because she needs my vote to stay in power. Pragmatism is enough. I will not go back to the Left—they are finished—and I will not vote for a government that sees me as a problem to be fixed with laws.
primary_drivers: Krishak Bandhu scheme — direct money in hand before crisis, not after
CAA/NRC threat — BJP's citizenship logic does not protect Muslims with incomplete documents
Mamata's dependence on Muslim votes means her promise of no NRC in Bengal holds weight
